saints.name: Saint Michael the Confessor, Bishop of Synnada

troparion.text: From your youth you dedicated your life to God, / and you were proclaimed shepherd and hierarch of Christ, holy Michael. / You endured afflictions and exile / because you honored the icon of Christ; / now you pour forth healings for us all.

kontakion.text: As a most honorable hierarch and champion of true piety, / undaunted by fear of the notorious tyrant, / you conquered his heretical opposition, freely proclaiming in a loud voice: / “I venerate the icon of Christ and of His all-pure Mother!” / Therefore, we honor you, O Michael!

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy mother Euphrosynē, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Paisius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Martyr Michael “the Black-Robed” of Saint Savva Monastery

troparion.text: The image of God was truly preserved in you, O Father, / for you took up the Cross and followed Christ. / By so doing you taught us to disregard the flesh for it passes away / but to care instead for the soul, since it is immortal. / Therefore your spirit, venerable Michael, rejoices with the angels.

saints.name: Holy Myrrh-bearer Mary, the wife of Cleopas

troparion.text: When You proclaimed “Rejoice” to the Myrrhbearers,  / You caused the lamentation of the first mother Eve to cease by Your Resurrection; O Christ God;  / You bade Your Apostles to preach:  /  “The Savior is risen from the tomb.”

Successor of the Apostles and faithful intercessor with God,  / by your virtues you rose to the height of Heaven,  / and lovingly you devoted yourself to Him Who loved you,  / and brought an unbelieving people to faith.  / Therefore, now rejoicing together with the Angels,  / you stand before the glorious Throne of Christ God, the King of all.  / O Hierarch Leontius, pray that He may save our souls.

kontakion.text: Because of the purity of your life, /  the All-Seeing Lord has given His light to your soul,  / in order to explain your teaching to many, O Venerable Leontius.
